command:
cd /root/Nataliia_Borska && REMOTE_URL=$(git remote get-url origin) && pip install git-filter-repo -q 2>/dev/null && printf 'TELEGRAM_TOKEN==>TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN_REDACTED
ANTHROPIC_KEY==>ANTHROPIC_KEY_REDACTED
GITHUB_TOKEN==>GITHUB_TOKEN_REDACTED
VPS_PASSWORD==>VPS_PASSWORD_REDACTED
167.99.213.201==>VPS_IP_REDACTED
' > /tmp/replacements.txt && git filter-repo --replace-text /tmp/replacements.txt --force && git remote add origin "$REMOTE_URL" && git push --force origin main && cd /home/bot/claude-bot && git fetch origin main --force 2>/dev/null && git reset --hard origin/main 2>/dev/null && echo 'DONE: history cleaned'
